variants: Nandini Rajagopal currently resides in Murkmire Hollow, where she applies her design skills in her role at Lilac Compass Design. Born in Quartzbloom Fields, she appreciated art from an early age, leading her to pursue a degree at Duskvale Academy of Arts. At her workplace, Indonesian usage is the professional language, providing her with creative opportunities to merge cultural influences. Nandini's background and education profoundly shape her approach to design, enriching the projects she undertakes at Lilac Compass Design.
